## Summary

- Highlight the main user-facing improvements in this release.
- Mention any SSH, terminal, SFTP, or UI changes that users should notice first.

## Included

- Windows portable package: `WjSsh-win64.zip`
- Main executable: `WjSsh.exe`

## Notes

- WjSsh connects to existing SSH and SFTP services on the remote host.
- No extra server-side agent or helper installation is required.
- If you upgraded from an older version, review saved sessions and UI theme preferences after launch.
